data.title: Short Stories for Kids to Read
data.description:
Short Stories is an educational tool designed to promote independent reading in kids aged 5 and up. Based on pedagogical and psycholinguistic principles, this collection of short stories develops reading, comprehension, and pronunciation skills in an interactive, child-friendly environment. Carefully selected classic stories and fables capture children’s interest while promoting cultural and moral values essential for their growth.

⭐ MAIN FEATURES
• Unique illustrations on every page
• Adaptive background music in each story
• Read-aloud option
• Slowed-down pronunciation of individual words
• Virtual library with classic stories and fables
• Short books with brief texts per page
• Customizable font types
• Option for all caps and mixed case text
• Language switching
• Night mode

🎨 UNIQUE ILLUSTRATIONS ON EVERY PAGE
Every page includes a different illustration designed to focus attention, support imagination, and clarify what is being read. The artwork provides visual context, keeps motivation high, and turns each scene into a moment that children will remember.

🎶 ADAPTIVE BACKGROUND MUSIC
Each story features background music that adapts to calm, action, or suspenseful moments. The soundtrack builds an emotional bridge to the narrative, improves engagement, and supports comprehension by reinforcing tone and atmosphere while kids read.

🎤 READ-ALOUD OPTION
A natural voice reads the current page. Children can follow along as they listen, which strengthens fluency, intonation, and confidence. It is ideal for early readers and for practicing pronunciation in a supportive way.

🔍 SLOWED-DOWN PRONUNCIATION
Tapping any word plays it at a slower speed so each sound is clear. This immediate, playful feedback helps kids decode words, practice difficult phonemes, and build accurate pronunciation step by step.

📚 VIRTUAL LIBRARY
The app includes a wide selection of classic tales and fables chosen to inspire a love of reading. Stories are entertaining, meaningful, and suitable for different ages, encouraging curiosity and positive values.

📖 SHORT BOOKS WITH BRIEF TEXTS
Each book has up to 30 pages with very short texts per page. This makes reading accessible and less intimidating, reduces fatigue, and helps children practice independently in short, effective sessions.

✏️ CUSTOMIZABLE FONT TYPES
Up to four font options make text comfortable and accessible for each child. Families and educators can choose the style that feels clearer on different screens and lighting conditions.

🔠 ALL CAPS OR MIXED CASE
Text can be shown entirely in uppercase to support early recognition, or in a standard combination of lowercase and uppercase to practice conventional reading. Choose what works best at each stage.

🌐 LANGUAGE SWITCHING
Short Stories is multilingual: switch text to Spanish, French, German, Italian, or Portuguese. Kids can read familiar tales while exploring vocabulary in a new language, without changing the context of the story.

🌙 NIGHT MODE
Night mode adjusts colors and brightness for evening reading, making the screen gentler on the eyes and more comfortable before bedtime.

Short Stories is a practical companion for classrooms and homes. With page-by-page illustrations, adaptive music, and interactive tools, it turns reading into a rich experience that supports skills, autonomy, and enjoyment. Download now and open the door to a world of stories and learning for your kids.

data.summary: All caps short texts for reading practice with texts aloud for kids 5 and up
data.recentChanges:
- New Christmas story "The Message in the Tree"
- Practice reading and unlock Achievements!
- Various improvements and bug fixes for a smooth reading experience.
- Don't forget to rate us so we can continue to improve. Thank you!
